input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.12.11.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.12.11.1
            TITLE: passing during endurance may only be done in the designated passing zones, under the

            CONTENT:
            rule D.12.11.1: Passing during Endurance may only be done in the designated passing zones, under the
D.12.11.1 Passing during Endurance may only be done in the designated passing zones, under the 
control of the track officials.
Formula SAE® Rules 2024 © 2023 SAE International  Page 137 of 140   
Version 1.0   1 Sep 2023

final_answer: Passing during Endurance may only be done in the designated passing zones, under the control of the track officials.
